overview.value: Rocket Factory Augsburg (RFA) was established in 2018 as a corporate spinoff from OHB, via MT Aerospace Holding. The company offers what it calls precise, flexible and low-cost launch services. RFA describes itself as committed to making a more sustainable world.

events.headline: Rocket Factory Augsburg is established as a corporate spinoff from OHB via MT Aerospace Holding
Rocket Factory Augsburg secures exclusive access to SaxaVord Spaceport's Launch Pad Fredo for first launch
RFA One first stage destroyed in static fire test explosion at SaxaVord Spaceport (per SpaceNews)
ESA preselects Rocket Factory Augsburg as one of five challengers for the European Launcher Challenge
